title: About us
subtitle: A place where coffee and good moments always exist.

story.title: Our story
story.p1: The house of the Frappesaurio was created to build a cozy place where people can enjoy a good drink with friends or family.
story.p2: Inspired by the prehistoric world, we offer a fun and unique experience while keeping the warmth of a traditional coffee shop.

location.title: Where to find us
location.subtitle: Visit us and enjoy a mesozoic coffee experience.

philosophy.title: Our philosophy
philosophy.text: We believe a good cup of coffee can make the day better. That's why we care about every detail so every visit becomes a moment worth repeating.
